name: Oysters Rockefeller 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the fresh, shucked oysters thoroughly, ensuring all shell particles are removed.
2. If using pie pans: Spread rock salt evenly on the bottoms of four 6-inch pie pans. Place six oyster shells in each pan on top of the rock salt. Arrange one oyster in each shell. If using a jelly roll pan, arrange the oysters so they appear slightly dry.
3. Cover each oyster completely with plenty of sauce (approximately 3 tablespoons per oyster).
4. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes until the tops are brownish.
5. To serve: If using pie pans, place the pans, salt, and oysters on heat-proof dinner dishes and serve immediately. Eat the oysters and sauce directly from the shell with a fork. If not using pie pans, arrange six oysters with sauce on each serving dish.
6. Yields 24 oysters.
